text:
Market today: IBM's earnings warning is weighing on tech sentiment, but cybersecurity names are bucking the trend with positive AI spending news. Geopolitical tensions are also pushing oil higher.

Your holdings: SOXL is down -30.59% and SPAL is new, leveraged, and down -36.78%. Both are highly volatile and on margin, demanding immediate attention.

Watch: Monitor broader tech for spillover from IBM and keep an eye on continued strength in cybersecurity names.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing your leveraged, underperforming positions and be highly selective with any new tech entries.
plays: SOXL: This leveraged ETF is down -30.59%. Consider trimming or respecting its default stop to manage risk, given its decay and your margin.
SPAL: Down -36.78%, this new leveraged ETF needs immediate attention. Respect its stop at 21.38 to prevent further deep drawdowns.
AMD: Scanner shows a strong BUY setup (entry 547.58-547.03, stop 545.95) if you're looking to add a chip name with good momentum.
